---
title: "Adverse Event Analysis â€” Summary"
author: "Tianqi Ouyang"
date: last-modified
---

## Overview

This sub-project of the **HARMONY Terlipressin Registry** analyzes adverse events (AE) associated with terlipressin treatment in patients with hepatorenal syndrome-acute kidney injury (HRS-AKI) across 15 hospitals.

## Data Pipeline

```{mermaid}
flowchart TD
    A[Parent Project: final_master_01282026.xlsx] --> B[Load & type-convert columns]
    B --> C[Derive AE variables]
    C --> D[Descriptive Tables]
    C --> E[Regression Models]
    C --> F[Subgroup Analyses]
    D --> G[CSV outputs in results/]
    E --> G
    F --> G
```

## Adverse Event Definitions

| Variable | Definition | Type |
|---|---|---|
| `any_ae` | Any adverse event | Categorical |
| `abdominal_ae` | abdpain OR diarrhea OR nausea | Categorical |
| `serious_ae` | respfail OR brady OR terli_7 OR terli_8 | Categorical |
| `terli_ae_abdpain` | Abdominal pain | Categorical |
| `terli_ae_nausea` | Nausea | Categorical |
| `terli_ae_diarrhea` | Diarrhea | Categorical |
| `terli_ae_volover` | Volume overload | Categorical |
| `terli_ae_brady` | Bradycardia | Categorical |
| `terli_ae_respfail` | Respiratory failure | Categorical |
| `terli_7` | Ischemic event 1 | Categorical |
| `terli_8` | Ischemic event 2 | Categorical |

## Other Key Derived Variables

| Variable | Formula | Type |
|---|---|---|
| `BMI` | `aki_weight / (aki_height/100)^2` | Numerical |
| `meld_fda` | 1 if `coalesce(day0_meld, admit_meld, admit_meld_3) > 35` | Categorical |
| `rrt_90days` | 1 if `days_to_rrt <= 90` | Categorical |
| `lt_90days` | 1 if `time_to_transplant <= 90` | Categorical |

---

## Request 1: 11/26/2025

| Request | Done |
|---------|------|
| AE incidence table stratified by `criteria_2` (ACLF) | âś… |
| AE incidence table stratified by `criteria_3` (sCr) | âś… |
| AE incidence table stratified by `criteria_4` (Hypoxemia) | âś… |
| Univariable AE predictors using all Table 1 covariates, outcome: `any_ae` | âś… |
| Univariable AE predictors, outcome: `abdominal_ae` | âś… |
| Univariable AE predictors, outcome: `serious_ae` (respfail, brady, terli_7, terli_8) | âś… |
| Univariable AE predictors, outcome: `terli_ae_respfail` | âś… |
| Multivariable logistic: `aclf_grade + scr_terli_day0 + respiratory_f` â†’ `any_ae` | âś… |
| Univariable competing risk (Fine-Gray, death) for all AE types | âś… |
| Multivariable competing risk: `any_ae + age + race + hispanic + MELD` | âś… |
| Multivariable competing risk: `any_ae + age + race + hispanic + aclf_grade` | âś… |
| Multivariable competing risk: `serious_ae + age + race + hispanic + MELD` | âś… |
| Multivariable competing risk: `serious_ae + age + race + hispanic + aclf_grade` | âś… |
| ICU subgroup: univariable logistic `any_ae` â†’ `icu_admit` (cohort: `location_terli_day0 == 1 or 2`) | âś… |
| Transplant subgroup: univariable competing risk (failcode=2, `listed_transplant == 1`) | âś… |

---

## Request 2: 01/12/2025

| Request | Done |
|---------|------|
| Create `abdominal_ae` = 1 if `terli_ae_abdpain=1` OR `terli_ae_diarrhea=1` OR `terli_ae_nausea=1` | âś… |
| Create `serious_ae` = 1 if `terli_ae_volover=1` OR `terli_ae_respfail=1` OR `terli_8=1` OR `terli_7=1` | âś… |
| Create `meld_fda` = 1 if `day0_meld > 35`, if missing use `admit_meld` | âś… |
| Baseline characteristics table stratified by `any_ae` | âś… |
| Baseline characteristics table stratified by `abdominal_ae` | âś… |
| Baseline characteristics table stratified by `serious_ae` | âś… |
| Baseline characteristics table stratified by `terli_ae_respfail` | âś… |
| 4 multivariable competing risk models (any_ae/serious_ae x MELD/aclf_grade) | âś… |
| ICU subgroup analysis | âś… |
| Transplant-listed subgroup: competing risk with `any_ae, serious_ae, hrs_responders_cat_2, day0_meld, meld_fda, aclf_grade` | âś… |

---

## Request 3: 01/18/2026

| Request | Done |
|---------|------|
| Reformatted all analyses as column/row specifications | âś… |
| Same analyses as Request 2, reformatted | âś… |

---

## Request 4: 01/29/2026

| Request | Done |
|---------|------|
| New table: `serious_ae` as column variable with baseline characteristics | âś… |
| New table: `terli_ae_respfail` as column variable with baseline characteristics | âś… |
| Specify Fine-Gray for competing risk models | âś… |
| Update competing risk Model 3: use `admit_meld_3` instead of `day0_meld` | âś… |

---

## Request 5: 04/07/2026

### New Variables

| Variable | Definition | Done |
|---|---|---|
| `comb_effusion_edema = 0` | `chest_imaging_effusion=0` AND `chest_imaging_pulmedema=0` | âś… |
| `comb_effusion_edema = 1` | `chest_imaging_effusion=1` AND `chest_imaging_pulmedema=0` | âś… |
| `comb_effusion_edema = 2` | `chest_imaging_effusion=0` AND `chest_imaging_pulmedema=1` | âś… |
| `comb_effusion_edema = 3` | `chest_imaging_effusion=1` AND `chest_imaging_pulmedema=1` | âś… |
| `ratio_albumin_b4terli` | `totalalbumin_before_terli / aki_weight` | âś… |
| `ratio_albumin_total` | `total_albumin / aki_weight` | âś… |

### Coding Fix

| Request | Done |
|---------|------|
| For `chest_imaging=1` AND missing `chest_imaging_effusion`, set to 0 | âś… |
| For `chest_imaging=1` AND missing `chest_imaging_pulmedema`, set to 0 | âś… |

### Updated Tables

| Request | Done |
|---------|------|
| Criteria tables (2/3/4): add `serious_AE, comb_effusion_edema, ratio_albumin_b4terli, ratio_albumin_total` | âś… |
| Categorical: AE vars + `serious_AE, comb_effusion_edema`; Numerical: both ratios | âś… |
| New SAE table: column `serious_AE`, rows: AE vars + `comb_effusion_edema`, both ratios | âś… |
| Updated respiratory failure table: add `serious_AE, comb_effusion_edema`, both ratios | âś… |

### Updated Models

| Request | Done |
|---------|------|
| Multivariable logistic: `sex_male + inr_admit + akin + chest_imaging_effusion` â†’ `any_ae` | âś… |
| Competing risk Model 1: `any_ae + age + race + hispanic + admit_meld_3` (was `day0_meld`) | âś… |
